ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-12-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Continued To Dec-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for (administrator) William Aal.

The Court stated that it is looking for the report on status of administration. Mr. Melbostad responded that the holdup is still the resolution of the Franchise Tax Board's creditors claim, that Mr. Aal has not been following through, that he has now authorized the hiring of a CPA and that counsel spoke with the Franchise Tax Board and most of the penalties will be waived. The status on filing a Petition for Final Distribution or Further Report on Status of Administration was continued to December 12, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Ideta. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Continued To Nov-21-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for and with (administrator) William Aal.

The Court asked for the timing on a petition for final distribution. Mr. Melbostad reported that the holdup is the tax returns, that they cannot pull together the records, that Mr. Aal has now hired a CPA, that they will be paying the probate referee and that the condo conversion is not complete but that it would be disruptive to transfer title now. The status on filing a petition for final distribution or further report on status of administration was continued to November 21, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Continued To Aug-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-25-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Continued To Nov-25-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for (administrator) William Aal.

The Court stated that it still needs an Inventory & Appraisal and action on the 3 creditor claims. Mr. Melbostad reported that they have worked hard to address the notes, that Bank of America has written off 2 of the 3 claims and have agreed to a release of the claims, that they have provided requested information to the probate referee and are proceeding with the appraisal, that they have prepared the taxes through 2009 and are working on 2010, that once filed it will take the IRS 90 days to process, that the penalties to the IRS will be adjusted once they file the returns and after that process they will be able to file for final distribution. The status report was continued to November 25, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the inventory & appraisal and creditor claims and to check in on the status of the tax issues.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Continued To Oct-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Continued To Sep-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-17-2015 Continued To Aug-31-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing I&A And Petn For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing I&A And Petn For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Continued To Jul-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for (administrator) William Aal.

Mr. Melbostad reported that he needs an additional 2 weeks to file the status report, that he was unable to get an answer as to how to move forward until yesterday and anticipates needing a 9 month continuance to finish up and distribute. The status on filing an Inventory & Appraisal and petition for final distribution was continued to July 7, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing I&A And Petn For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-26-2015 Continued To Jun-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for (Executor) William Aal.

Mr. Melbostad reported that he had lost touch with the executor for the last year and a half, that he spoke with him over the weekend, that the executor has submitted papers regarding the condo conversion, that he was advised by his CPA to sell the condo rather than distributing it to himself and that they will need a 6 month continuance. The status of filing an inventory & appraisal and petition for final distribution was continued to June 23, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the filing of a (noticed) petition to report on status of estate.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
